content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.49%, Bank Nifty -0.85%, VIX +2.77% to 17.08 — mild risk-off tape but IT and Pharma defensives bid. Book is heavily long with 14 CNC names; priority is trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.4%, COFORGE +7.1%, HAL +4.8%, CAMS +4.4%) to lock gains. New entries restricted given ~67% deployed and HAL board meeting May 14 binary risk approaching.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.4% unrealized, CMP 1076-1083 with intraday high 1089. Current SL 1064.67 is 1.0% below CMP — keep trailing slightly tighter to 1055 (~2.6% below CMP) to maintain 1% trail-gap discipline while protecting most of the gain. Doji on 05-05 + bearish engulfing on 05-04 suggest consolidation; thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, brokerage TP 1100-1260) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -0.3%, SL 121 (~3% below). VIX rising, gold bid resuming. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4740.00,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% with CMP 4790. May 14 board meeting (Q4 results) is in 4 trading sessions — Rule 11 binary-event window opens next session. Tighten SL slightly from 4725.56 to 4740 (~1.05% below CMP, respecting 1% trail-gap floor) to cap pre-event downside. Will reassess for partial trim or full exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7250.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, CMP 7043. Stored SL 6960 is already 1.18% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY would waste signal; leaving SL/target unchanged. Actually emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, CMP 365.50, SL 365 — sitting right on SL. Per Rule 17, do NOT pre-empt SL. Q4 PAT +31%, lending +32% YoY, sector tailwind from rate cuts. Let SL fire if it does; thesis intact, recovery option preserved."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3%, CMP 830.60, SL 822 already ~1.0% below — at trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.1%, CMP 1351. SL 1329.47 is 1.6% below CMP — still within healthy trail-gap, no-op MODIFY. Emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3020.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.5%, CMP 3062. Trail SL from 2998 to 3020 (~1.4% below CMP) — locks in small gain while respecting 1% floor. FY26 record results, Antique TP 3141, defense theme intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.4%, CMP 842.60. SL 827.41 is 1.8% below CMP — healthy trail. No-op MODIFY; emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 1481, SL 1445 (~2.4% below). Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps. Stock spiked 8.58% intraday but settled — thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, CMP 2433, SL 2400 (1.4% below). Q4 print May 7 was excellent (PBT +115%, US sales +46%, 900% dividend, USFDA Glycerol approval) — stock spiked to 2475 then faded. Thesis fully intact, hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, CMP 1614, SL 1580 (~2.1% below). Q4 turnaround (loss to +Rs 164cr, EBITDA margin 20.3%), Zaynich USFDA pipeline. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2750.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 2782. Trail SL from 2700 to 2750 (~1.15% below CMP) — respecting trail-gap floor. Q4 EBITDA +13.5%, Refrigerants capex ramp. Locks in marginal gain protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 9000.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, CMP 9103 after +9.19% breakout day. Trail SL from 8800 to 9000 (~1.1% below CMP) to protect against post-breakout fade. Q4 record (rev +27%, FMEG +47%), MOSL TP 9800. Tightening modestly given volatility around fresh 52w high."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "Lock most of +9.4% gain; trail to 1055 maintaining 1% floor below CMP 1083."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, VIX rising; SL at 121 adequate."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 4740.00, "reasoning": "May 14 binary event in 4 sessions — modest tightening to cap pre-event downside while leaving room."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 6960 already 1.18% below CMP — adequate trail-gap, no further tightening."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Sitting on SL but Rule 17 — let SL fire if it does, thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at 1% trail-gap floor; no tightening."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1329 is 1.6% below CMP — healthy gap on +7% winner."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 3020.00, "reasoning": "Modest trail above entry to lock breakeven+ on defense play."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 827 is 1.8% below CMP — adequate."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst playing out, hold."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print, allow recovery to target."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Turnaround thesis; SL 1580 absorbs noise."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 2750.00, "reasoning": "Move SL up from 2700 to 2750 after intraday +10% breakout move."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 9000.00, "reasoning": "Tighten SL after 9% breakout day to protect against post-breakout fade."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARATFORG BUY 25@2015 CNC still OPEN (398min) — let it work, not stacking. HFCL 600@133.50 MIS placed 3279min ago is stale across days; should have been cancelled but per ORDER HYGIENE guidance not re-emitting. New BULLISH candidates from research: POLYCAB (+0.10), PIDILITIND (+0.10), COFORGE (+0.10), LUPIN (+0.10), GRSE (+0.10) — all already HELD, can't add more (cluster/sector limits). Specialty chem cluster (NAVINFLUOR + SRF + PIDILITIND held) at limit. Capital goods (HAL + GRSE + POLYCAB held + BHARATFORG pending) at cluster cap. Financial services (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) at 3 names. Pharma (LUPIN + WOCKPHARMA) — could add NH or LAURUSLABS but Rule 11 considerations as Q4 prints clustered. RAMCOCEM bearish near 52w low — pass. THERMAX/FINCABLES/BHARATFORG — cap goods cluster full. CAMS already at +5.7% breakout; adding to holding is poor R:R given near 52w high. Conclusion: book is appropriately deployed at 67%, no admit slot opens without exiting an existing name first.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 67% — within healthy band, below 80% soft target with ~₹136K headroom but no qualifying admit slot given cluster caps already binding (Specialty Chem 3 names, Cap Goods 3 names + 1 pending, Financials 3 names, Pharma 2 names). Today's tape is mild risk-off (Nifty -0.49%, VIX +2.77%) — defensive trail-SL focus is correct. HAL May 14 board meeting is in 4 sessions and binary-event window opens next session per Rule 11 — will need EXIT or risk-trim disposition by Day-20/21. POLYCAB and SRF intraday spikes faded — trail-SL discipline more important than chase. Daily P&L +1.47% healthy."
}
